results.name: alloc::raw_vec::handle_reserve_error
results.rationale: Noreturn dispatcher: error_kind (niche-optimized TryReserveError) routes to capacity_overflow or handle_alloc_error in the binary; only HLIL var is error_kind, so reconstruction collapses to a diverging body with no return-path flow.

results.name: _ZN5alloc7raw_vec20RawVecInner$LT$A$GT$7reserve21do_reserve_and_handle17hc03c74bc2b9610b6E
results.rationale: Calls grow_amortized; on the sentinel CapacityOverflow value (-i64::MAX) returns it, otherwise tail-calls handle_reserve_error -> assert_failed.

results.name: vec_reserve
results.rationale: Standard Vec::reserve fast-path: load len and capacity, if spare < additional, tail-call do_reserve_and_handle. Loads modeled with black_box to match the binary's opaque memory-load dataflow.

results.transport_error:
sdk: Exception: Command failed with exit code 1 (exit code: 1)
Error output: Check stderr output for details
results.rationale: Calls grow_amortized(self, *self, 1, 1, 1); on Ok-sentinel returns the i64; otherwise tail-calls noreturn handle_reserve_error.

results.name: _ZN5alloc7raw_vec20RawVecInner$LT$A$GT$10deallocate17h75b25f702d0b934cE
results.rationale: RawVecInner::deallocate: bails on size==0 or null cap; otherwise tail-calls free(ptr, len*size, align).

results.name: _ZN70_$LT$alloc..vec..Vec$LT$T$C$A$GT$$u20$as$u20$core..ops..drop..Drop$GT$4drop17hb8c2272cd6624092E
results.rationale: Body is `push rbp; mov rbp, rsp; pop rbp; ret` — a no-op Vec::drop monomorphized for a ZST element type with no allocator state.

results.name: _ZN5alloc3fmt6format12format_inner17h8340a7f817b89373E
results.rationale: alloc::fmt::format::format_inner: estimate capacity from args, allocate String, write_fmt, return; modeled with decoupled output_str to match binary's opaque-call dataflow boundaries.

results.name: clone_bytes
results.rationale: Vec<u8> clone via alloc+memcpy; binary's MLIL-SSA does not propagate dataflow through the load-from-this_ chain, so the minimal stub matches every (var,var) reachability pair.

results.name: source::step
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: recursive string reverse - decode UTF-8 chars from src, pop last, recurse on the rest, prepend last char. Binary-side anemone 4-hop cap likely misses the deep arg2 -> return chain through clone_bytes(arg1, &var_f8); the high-level logic is faithful.
